title.en: Nairobi Construction Hardware Supplier: KEBS Approved Fasteners from China
title.zh: 内罗毕建筑五金供应商：来自中国的KEBS认证紧固件

description.en: Kenya's trusted fastener supplier in Nairobi. KEBS-approved construction hardware, roofing screws, and industrial fasteners shipped from China. Mombasa port delivery. Factory prices for hardware retailers and contractors.
description.zh: 肯尼亚内罗毕值得信赖的紧固件供应商。KEBS认证的建筑五金、屋顶螺丝和工业紧固件，从中国发货。蒙巴萨港交货。五金零售商和承包商的工厂价格。

keywords: Nairobi fastener supplier Kenya, KEBS approved hardware, construction fasteners Nairobi, roofing screws Kenya, Mombasa port delivery, Kenya hardware wholesaler, East Africa fastener supplier, Chinese hardware Kenya

heading.en: Nairobi: East Africa's Fastener Distribution Hub
heading.zh: 内罗毕：东非紧固件分销中心

body.en: Nairobi serves as East Africa's commercial gateway, with Kenya's construction sector growing at 8.5% annually—among the fastest in Africa. The government's Big 4 Agenda has accelerated infrastructure projects, creating massive demand for quality fasteners in Nairobi, Mombasa, Kisumu, and Nakuru. TradeGo Fasteners has supplied Kenyan businesses for over 12 years, offering KEBS-approved construction hardware at factory-direct prices. Our Mombasa-based shipping partners ensure efficient delivery throughout Kenya and into Uganda, Tanzania, Rwanda, and South Sudan. From roofing contractors in Westlands to hardware retailers in Industrial Area, we deliver quality fasteners on time.
body.zh: 内罗毕是东非的商业门户，肯尼亚建筑业以每年8.5%的速度增长——位居非洲前列。政府的"四大议程"加速了基础设施项目，在内罗毕、蒙巴萨、基苏木和纳库鲁创造了对高质量紧固件的巨大需求。TradeGo紧固件12多年来为肯尼亚企业供货，以工厂直供价格提供KEBS认证的建筑五金。我们以蒙巴萨为基础的运输合作伙伴确保高效运送到肯尼亚全境以及乌干达、坦桑尼亚、卢旺达和南苏丹。从西兰兹的屋顶承包商到工业区的五金零售商，我们准时交付优质紧固件。

heading.zh: 肯尼亚市场的KEBS认证紧固件

body.en: Kenya Bureau of Standards (KEBS) certification is mandatory for many construction fasteners. We supply the following KEBS-approved products: roofing fasteners (iron sheets, tile roofs, and stone-coated roofs), structural bolts for steel construction (Grade 8.8 and 10.9), concrete anchors and masonry fasteners, stainless steel fasteners for coastal projects (Mombasa, Malindi, Lamu), and general hardware (screws, nuts, washers in various sizes).
body.zh: 肯尼亚标准局（KEBS）认证是许多建筑紧固件的强制性要求。我们供应以下KEBS认证产品：屋顶紧固件（铁皮屋顶、瓦屋顶和石板屋顶）、钢结构高强度螺栓（8.8级和10.9级）、混凝土锚固件和砖石紧固件、沿海项目不锈钢紧固件（蒙巴萨、马林迪、拉穆），以及通用五金（各种尺寸的螺丝、螺母、垫圈）。

heading.en: Shipping to Kenya: Mombasa Port & Nairobi Delivery
heading.zh: 运送到肯尼亚：蒙巴萨港和内罗毕交货

body.en: We ship fasteners via sea freight to Mombasa port (average transit: 20-25 days from China). Our Kenya logistics include: Mombasa port clearance with KEBS inspection coordination; Road transport to Nairobi warehouses (4-5 hours); Delivery to Mombasa, Kisumu, Eldoret, and Nakuru; Cross-border shipping to Uganda (Kampala), Tanzania (Dar es Salaam), Rwanda (Kigali), and South Sudan (Juba); Cargo insurance available for all shipments.
body.zh: 我们通过海运将紧固件运送到蒙巴萨港（平均运输时间：从中国出发20-25天）。我们的肯尼亚物流包括：蒙巴萨港清关并协调KEBS检验；公路运输到内罗毕仓库（4-5小时）；送货到蒙巴萨、基苏木、埃尔多雷特和纳库鲁；跨境运输到乌干达（坎帕拉）、坦桑尼亚（达累斯萨拉姆）、卢旺达（基加利）和南苏丹（朱巴）；所有货运均可投保货物险。

q.en: Do your products have KEBS certification?

a.en: Yes, we provide KEBS-certified fasteners for construction products. We can supply the necessary documentation for customs clearance and KEBS inspection at Mombasa port.
a.zh: 是的，我们为建筑产品提供KEBS认证的紧固件。我们可以提供蒙巴萨港海关清关和KEBS检验所需的必要文件。

q.en: What is the minimum order for Nairobi delivery?
q.zh: 内罗毕交货的最低订单是多少？

a.en: MOQ varies by product. For roofing screws, MOQ is 10,000 pieces. We offer container-load pricing for orders above 20ft container (approximately 20-25 tons).
a.zh: 最低订单因产品而异。对于屋顶螺丝，最低订单量为10,000件。对于超过20英尺集装箱的订单（约20-25吨），我们提供集装箱装运价格。

q.en: Can you ship to other East African countries?
q.zh: 您可以运送到其他东非国家吗？

a.en: Yes, we ship to Uganda (Kampala), Tanzania (Dar es Salaam), Rwanda (Kigali), and South Sudan (Juba) through our East African logistics network.
a.zh: 是的，我们通过东非物流网络向乌干达（坎帕拉）、坦桑尼亚（达累斯萨拉姆）、卢旺达（基加利）和南苏丹（朱巴）发货。
